_comment: Audio clips live under server/eval/fixtures/ (gitignored). Record each clip at 16 kHz mono 16-bit PCM WAV. Speak the expected_transcript naturally — see README.md for recording tips.

clips.expected_transcript: We are building VoxScribe, a streaming transcription demo that uses AssemblyAI for the ASR and Claude Haiku for cleanup.
The FastAPI server talks to AssemblyAI over a WebSocket and mints a token. The iOS app captures audio with AVAudioEngine and streams PCM frames.
We are comparing Anthropic's Claude Haiku, Sonnet, and Opus models for this LLM-in-the-loop pipeline. Prompt caching keeps the system prompt warm.
SwiftUI in Xcode shows the partials while the ASR runs. We use VAD on the server side and uvicorn to serve the FastAPI app.
Arre yaar, chalo chai pi lete hain. Bhaiya ek masala chai aur ek lassi, bas.
Accha didi, ek paratha aur ek samosa bhi, matlab theek hai, haan bhai sab kuchh chalega.
Mumbai ki biryani alag hai na, Delhi wali bhi accha hai, aur Bengaluru mein bhi desi cafe mil jate hain.
Kya yaar, yeh jugaad kaam karega, timepass ke liye bas pani pila do.
